metadata.description: Synthetic fixture with no personal data.

raw_snapshot.payload:
# Systems Thinking Notes

Systems thinking helps writers connect ideas across books, notes, and research workflows. A knowledge graph can preserve context while search retrieves precise passages.

documents.title: Systems Thinking Notes
documents.text: Systems thinking helps writers connect ideas across books, notes, and research workflows. A knowledge graph can preserve context while search retrieves precise passages. Hybrid retrieval combines lexical search, semantic similarity, and graph neighborhoods.

topics.label: Systems thinking
topics.description: Thinking about relations and feedback loops.

topics.label: Hybrid retrieval
topics.description: Combining lexical, vector, and graph signals.
